Provisioning fixture

Document extraction decision

Decision Profiles Thresholds Boundary Lineage

Selection posture

Document extraction decision

OCR remains pluggable Self-host decision required
Managed default

Blocked by platform provider selection.

Canonical boundary

Provider output may create candidate facts only.

Execution posture

Async queue required once a provider or self-host runtime is chosen.

Document classes

Supported document profiles

Receipts, invoices, statements
Receipt capture

Candidate fields only, handwriting allowed with review.

Bank statement PDFs

Table-heavy rows remain review-heavy.

Mixed-language bundles

Not enabled in initial scope.

Deterministic review posture

Review threshold policy

Quarantine blocks extraction
Auto to candidate

Only bounded fields above policy thresholds may emit candidate facts.

Review required

Mixed language, handwriting, version drift, and stale rebase all force review.

Layout only retain

Screenshots retain text/layout for review without becoming workflow truth.

Source to candidate boundary

Candidate-fact boundary

No canonical promotion
Provider raw output

Separate, short-lived, restricted.

Normalized extraction JSON

Retained with evidence lineage and review posture.

Candidate facts

Reviewable intermediates only. No direct filing, totals, or authority truth.

Durable lineage strip

Lineage and retention

Object version pinned
Lineage

upload object version -> extraction run -> evidence item -> candidate facts

Dedup policy

Duplicate submissions collapse on stable object version plus profile.

Retention

Provider raw output and normalized JSON remain distinct from derived previews.
